name: Bush Tennis Center Midland
description: Bush Tennis Center Midland is a place to play pickleball in Midland, TX. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
hours: Monday – Friday: 8:00am-9:00pm Saturday & Sunday: 8:00am-5:00pm CHRIS DAVIDSON OPPORTUNITY PARK HOURS: Monday - Sunday: 9:00am -8:00pm BTC & CDOP reserve the right to adjust operating hours due to inclement weather

name: Pickleball Pavilion
description: Pickleball Pavilion is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Midland, TX. There are 8 acrylic courts. 5 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, youth programming, adaptive programming, and water.
